title: DEKTON 10 PCS Razor Single Edge Blade Set – Premium Stainless Steel Replacement Blades for Scraping, Cutting, Crafts, Home Projects, and Professional Use
features: High-Quality Blades: Premium stainless steel blades designed for superior sharpness, durability, and long-lasting edge retention for a variety of tasks.
Versatile Applications: Ideal for scraping paint, removing stickers, cutting tough materials, and precision craft work for DIY, art, or professional use.
Safe & Easy to Use: Compatible with most single-edge razor handles, offering precise control to reduce slips, making them safe for home and professional projects.
Convenient Storage: Compact design keeps blades organized in a toolbox, drawer, or craft bag. 10 blades per set ensures you’re always prepared.
Cost-Effective Pack: High-quality set with 10 blades allows multiple projects without frequent replacements, offering reliable performance and excellent value.
description: The DEKTON 10 PCS Razor Single Edge Blade Set features premium stainless steel blades built for sharpness, durability, and versatility. Perfect for scraping paint, removing stickers, cutting tough materials, and precise craft work, these blades suit DIY enthusiasts, professional contractors, and artists alike. Compact and convenient, the set is easy to store in your toolbox, drawer, or craft bag. Each blade provides safe, controlled cutting when used with a compatible razor or scraping tool. With 10 blades included, this set is a cost-effective, reliable choice for home projects, professional use, and creative crafts.
